title: Revolt
description: Open-source, self-hostable Discord alternative: a real-time chat platform with servers, channels, DMs, voice and file sharing (now branded Stoat).
installation: This template runs ONLY the PRIMARY Revolt backend API (the Rust 'delta' monolith, image ghcr.io/stoatchat/api, HTTP port 8000). Revolt (recently rebranded 'Stoat') is a MULTI-CONTAINER microservice stack; the API alone is not a usable deployment - you MUST deploy the companion services below pointing at the SAME datastores, and supply a shared Revolt.toml config file. CONFIG: Revolt is configured PRIMARILY via a Revolt.toml file bind-mounted at /Revolt.toml (mounted here at the persistent /config volume - drop your Revolt.toml there or mount it at the root); the env vars below override the database/redis/rabbit connection URLs that Revolt.toml otherwise carries. In Revolt.toml set hosts.app to your public https URL ({{KUBERO_APP_URL}}), generate the auth/file/voice secrets, and configure the S3/MinIO file backend. ROTATE: the documentdb mongoadmin password, and ALL secrets in Revolt.toml (api keys, auth pepper, file-server token, vapid/push keys, livekit keys) - the defaults are placeholders. ADD-ONS PROVISIONED HERE: documentdb (MongoDB-compatible - Revolt's primary datastore), valkey (Redis/KeyDB-compatible cache + pub/sub), and rabbitmq (push-notification + cross-service message queue). EXTERNAL SERVICE NOT PROVISIONED: Revolt requires an S3-compatible object store for ALL uploaded files/avatars/attachments (upstream ships MinIO image minio/minio) - deploy the RustFS/MinIO S3 add-on and point autumn at it via Revolt.toml [files] s3 settings; the local /config volume does NOT hold attachments. COMPANION SERVICES to deploy (all ghcr.io/stoatchat, pin to the same tag e.g. v0.13.6, all share Revolt.toml + the same Mongo/Redis/Rabbit/S3): events (websocket gateway, ghcr.io/stoatchat/events), autumn (file server, ghcr.io/stoatchat/file-server), january (link/media proxy, ghcr.io/stoatchat/proxy), crond (scheduled tasks, ghcr.io/stoatchat/crond), pushd (push-notification worker / rabbit consumer, ghcr.io/stoatchat/pushd), web (frontend client, ghcr.io/stoatchat/for-web), and a reverse proxy (caddy) to route the public domain to web/api/events/autumn. Voice is optional via voice-ingress + livekit (ghcr.io/stoatchat/livekit-server). FIRST-RUN: bring up Mongo/Redis/Rabbit and S3, then the api + companion services; open the web client, create the first account, and configure the instance.
